text:
NEW: The Education Dept. layoffs continued overnight, w/ the main office in charge of special ed funding being “decimated,” as one person described.

“They cut just about everyone that works with IDEA funding,” said another. “I’m not sure how these programs exist moving forward.”

Peacemaker? For almost 10 months, Donald Trump and his administration have actively participated in a genocide, arming it, funding it, using the UN veto to prevent a ceasefire, using official podiums to disseminate genocide propaganda, and attacking and punishing those who spoke

text:
The federal food program helping more than 1 in 4 young children access fresh produce, milk, and formula will run out of funding next week.

Over 5 million children could lose food assistance — all thanks to the Trump-Republican shutdown.

The cruelty is endless.

the best decision i’ve made by far

is saying

fuck money
fuck business
fuck mrr
fuck vc
fuck profiting
tuck competitors

and just making a cool product i’d use myself.

i don’t care about anything else.

text:
Since Day 1, Trump has tried to shut down the parts of government he doesn’t like.

He gutted federal agencies.

He took funding from Medicaid and SNAP and gave it to billionaires.

He has tried to illegally erase millions of dollars for programs Congress already approved.
thread:
Since Day 1, Trump has tried to shut down the parts of government he doesn’t like.

He gutted federal agencies.

He took funding from Medicaid and SNAP and gave it to billionaires.

He has tried to illegally erase millions of dollars for programs Congress already approved.

He has pushed the country into a government shutdown over his desire to make health care more expensive.

And now he is (incorrectly) saying he can deny back pay to as many as 750,000 federal workers.

Trump has always been trying to shut down the government.

The response of Republicans has been to let Trump do all of this and more while millions of Americans get hurt.

Democrats will not stand by and hand over a blank check.

Republicans must join us to protect health care coverage and end this painful government shutdown.

text:
Democrats are fighting to roll back Republican cuts that will take away health care from millions of people and raise insurance premiums for millions more. That’s it.

Republicans would rather continue this painful shutdown than negotiate to save health care funding.

Real business gets done in spreadsheets.

Not at the networking events in coffee shops. 

Too many founders confuse networking with productivity.
thread:
Real business gets done in spreadsheets.

Not at the networking events in coffee shops. 

Too many founders confuse networking with productivity.

If you're spending more time talking about your business than working in it, you're building a brand.

Not a business. 

I reserve my energy for operators who show me their numbers before they show me their pitch deck.

text:
Trump’s vindicative decision to cancel $8 billion in federal funding for energy projects is yet another example of his political retribution against California and his willingness to punish any state that didn’t vote for him. 
 
We’re not gonna let him get away with this.

Your first $100K should come from consulting.

Not VC. Not friends & family. Not savings.

From customers paying you to solve their problem manually.

Then productize what works. Not before.

text:
The shutdown is just one front in Trump's war on Americans. 

While the GOP holds paychecks hostage to gut health care, Trump is freezing vital NYC transit funding out of pure spite. It's a simple extortion effort to try to inflict pain and punish opponents. Stop trying to extort
